channel.title: Persistence on bubka hacks stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Persistence on bubka hacks stuff

item.title: Splunk-DCSync and DCShadow
item.description: Research covering DCSync and DCShadow detection - two advanced techniques abusing Active Directory replication permissions to extract password hashes and inject unauthorized AD changes without standard security logs, with Splunk queries targeting Event IDs 4662 and 4742.
